title: Ear pain

red_flags.text: Requires review for rapid worsening or systemic illness and identifies severe infection and acute complications including mastoiditis for hospital assessment.
red_flags.rationale: Directly supports mapped systemic-illness and mastoiditis concern prompts and clinician-documented escalation.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Requires review for rapid worsening or systemic illness and identifies severe infection and acute complications including mastoiditis for hospital assessment.

follow_up.text: Defines the pediatric acute-otitis-media population, usual duration, reassessment triggers, otorrhoea context, and serious-illness review.
follow_up.rationale: Directly supports mapped acute-otitis-media terminology, course, otorrhoea, worsening, and reassessment documentation.
follow_up.evidence_extract: Defines the pediatric acute-otitis-media population, usual duration, reassessment triggers, otorrhoea context, and serious-illness review.

source_limitations: No exact UAE clinician guideline for undifferentiated pediatric ear pain was identified.
External-ear, trauma, foreign-body, hearing, detailed otoscopy, and broad ear-pain content is not fully covered by the acute-otitis-media source.
Medication and antibiotic choices remain unsupported clinician-entered content.
Qualified clinician review has not been completed.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
